headline: Stanley Black & Decker Announces Release Date for Second Quarter 2026 Earnings
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) will release its second quarter 2026 earnings on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, before the market opens, followed by an earnings call at 8:00AM ET. The call will be available through a live teleconference and a listen-only webcast.

headline: Wells Fargo Sees More Upside in Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) after Talks with Management
summary: With a 5-Year Average Dividend Growth Rate of 3.47%, Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) is included among the Top 11 Dividend Kings to Buy for Safe Dividend Growth. On June 18, Wells Fargo raised the firm’s price recommendation on Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) to $90 from $80. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating […]
